arts.sum: Ilkay Gündogan has said Manchester City's trip to Liverpool on Sunday will be "as tough as it's possible to be" after a run of six games without a win.

arts.ttl: The day Real Madrid fans sang You'll Never Walk Alone
arts.sum: Ahead of the game, the Reds had placed a bouquet of flowers in the area where Madrid fans were seated as a tribute to Amancio Amaro, a former star of the Spanish club who had recently passed away. Back in early 2023, Liverpool and Real Madrid met at Anfield for the first leg of the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: 'Minds scrambled' - National media spot Man City reaction to Feyenoord collapse before Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool face Manchester City at Anfield in the Premier League on Sunday with Pep Guardiola's team on a six-game winless streak

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah's transfer U-turn and £150m bid speaks volumes amid Liverpool saga
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is yet to receive a fresh contract with Liverpool with his current deal expiring at the end of the current Premier League season - despite showing a wealth of loyalty to Anfield over the years

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid – Combined XI ahead of UCL clash
arts.sum: Liverpool face Real Madrid in a huge UEFA Champions League clash at Anfield this evening. Arne Slot’s side have four wins from four games in Europe this season but next take on the holders and perennial winners of this competition. It’s a fascinating matchup between two of the most successful sides in Champions League history. […] The post Liverpool vs Real Madrid – Combined XI ahead of UCL clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Defeat at Liverpool would likely end Man City’s title hopes – Ilkay Gundogan
arts.sum: City travel to Anfield on the back of another demoralising result.

arts.ttl: William Saliba sends Arsenal rallying cry and warns Liverpool they've turned a corner
arts.sum: William Saliba believes Arsenal are coming back towards their best form but insisted the only real proof is to keep on winning as they face another tough trip to West Ham on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool must act on Salah situation - Sutton
arts.sum: Monday Night Club's Chris Sutton and Rory Smith discuss Mohamed Salah's contract situation at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool line-ups for Real Madrid as Darwin Nunez dropped and Ibrahima Konate rested
arts.sum: Our Liverpool writers pick their teams for tonight's Champions League encounter with Real Madrid at Anfield

arts.ttl: Ilkay Gundogan ready to throw in the title towel if Man City’s ‘inexplicable’ form continues at Liverpool
arts.sum: A draw vs Feyenoord felt “like a loss” according to the former City captain
